QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_43

question.text: Under which section of the Income Tax Act are NPS partial withdrawals exempt from tax?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS partial withdrawals are exempt from tax under Section 10(12B) of the Income Tax Act. **The Trap:** 80CCD sections relate to contribution deductions, not withdrawal exemptions. Section 10(12B) specifically covers partial withdrawal exemption. **Cross-Exam Context:** Tax on NPS: Contributions = 80CCD(1), 80CCD(1B), 80CCD(2). Partial withdrawal = 10(12B). Exit lump sum = tax-free (60%). Annuity = taxable. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Remind clients that partial withdrawals are tax-free, which makes NPS an attractive option compared to breaking a fixed deposit.
